'''ây-dh-r''' ('''kayadhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mademoiselle|mademoiselle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mademoiselle|mademoiselle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-dh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kayadhar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyadhar|thiyadhar]] || [[word:jiyadhar|jiyadhar]] || [[word:shiyadhar|shiyadhar]] || [[word:kiyadhar|kiyadhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyadhar|thuthuyadhar]] || [[word:jujuyadhar|jujuyadhar]] || [[word:shushuyadhar|shushuyadhar]] || [[word:kukuyadhar|kukuyadhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyadhar|thuyadhar]] || [[word:juyadhar|juyadhar]] || [[word:shuyadhar|shuyadhar]] || [[word:kuyadhar|kuyadhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyadhar|thuyadhar]] || [[word:juyadhar|juyadhar]] || [[word:shuyadhar|shuyadhar]] || [[word:kuyadhar|kuyadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyadhar|theyadhar]] || [[word:jeyadhar|jeyadhar]] || [[word:sheyadhar|sheyadhar]] || [[word:keyadhar|keyadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyadhar|thothoyadhar]] || [[word:jojoyadhar|jojoyadhar]] || [[word:shoshoyadhar|shoshoyadhar]] || [[word:kokoyadhar|kokoyadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyadhar|thoyadhar]] || [[word:joyadhar|joyadhar]] || [[word:shoyadhar|shoyadhar]] || [[word:koyadhar|koyadhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyadhar|thoyadhar]] || [[word:joyadhar|joyadhar]] || [[word:shoyadhar|shoyadhar]] || [[word:koyadhar|koyadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyadhar|thĂŠyadhar]] || [[word:jĂŠyadhar|jĂŠyadhar]] || [[word:shĂŠyadhar|shĂŠyadhar]] || [[word:kĂŠyadhar|kĂŠyadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayadhar|thathayadhar]] || [[word:jajayadhar|jajayadhar]] || [[word:shashayadhar|shashayadhar]] || [[word:kakayadhar|kakayadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayadhar|thayadhar]] || [[word:jayadhar|jayadhar]] || [[word:shayadhar|shayadhar]] || [[word:kayadhar|kayadhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayadhar|thayadhar]] || [[word:jayadhar|jayadhar]] || [[word:shayadhar|shayadhar]] || [[word:kayadhar|kayadhar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayadhar|shayadhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayadhar|goshayadhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayadhar|gokishayadhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayadharnĂŒ|shayadharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayadharnknĂŒ|goshayadharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadharnĂŒ|gokishayadharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayadharshĂ«|shayadharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayadharnkshĂ«|goshayadharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayadharshĂ«|gokishayadharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadharo|shayadharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadharnkro|goshayadharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadharo|gokishayadharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadharmu|shayadharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadharnkmu|goshayadharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadharmu|gokishayadharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayadharsher|shayadharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayadharnksher|goshayadharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayadharsher|gokishayadharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayadharng|shayadharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayadharnkng|goshayadharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayadharng|gokishayadharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayadharya|shayadharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayadharnkya|goshayadharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayadharya|gokishayadharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayadharyam|shayadharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayadharnkyam|goshayadharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayadharyam|gokishayadharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadharnĂŒshĂ«|shayadharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayadharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayadharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadharnĂŒro|shayadharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadharnknĂŒro|goshayadharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadharnĂŒro|gokishayadharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadharnĂŒmu|shayadharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadharnknĂŒmu|goshayadharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadharnĂŒmu|gokishayadharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadharshĂ«nĂŒ|shayadharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayadharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayadharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadharshĂ«ro|shayadharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadharnkshĂ«ro|goshayadharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadharshĂ«ro|gokishayadharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadharshĂ«mu|shayadharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadharnkshĂ«mu|goshayadharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadharshĂ«mu|gokishayadharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadharonĂŒ|shayadharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadharnkronĂŒ|goshayadharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadharonĂŒ|gokishayadharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadharoshĂ«|shayadharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadharnkroshĂ«|goshayadharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadharoshĂ«|gokishayadharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadharomu|shayadharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadharnkromu|goshayadharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadharomu|gokishayadharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadharmunĂŒ|shayadharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadharnkmunĂŒ|goshayadharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadharmunĂŒ|gokishayadharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadharmushĂ«|shayadharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadharnkmushĂ«|goshayadharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadharmushĂ«|gokishayadharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadharmuro|shayadharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadharnkmuro|goshayadharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadharmuro|gokishayadharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
